scripts.dev:init: pnpm cluster k3d deps up && pnpm cluster k3d up && pnpm docker:build && pnpm dev:push && pnpm cluster deploy dev --bootstrap && pnpm cluster deploy dev
scripts.dev:destroy: pnpm cluster k3d down && pnpm cluster k3d deps down
